ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Health conditions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_software_version" TEXT /* Software version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the device */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the device */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the device */,
  "light" REAL /* Light exposure of the device */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the device */,
  "sound" REAL /* Sound levels around the device */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the device */,
  "pedometer" REAL /* Pedometer reading of the device */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., step count, distance) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "goal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress entry */,
  "progress_value" REAL /* Value of the progress entry */,
  "progress_note" TEXT /* Note about the progress entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., step count, distance) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_read" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity data entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "activity_value" REAL /* Value of the activity data entry */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity */,
  "activity_distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "sleep_start" TEXT /* Start time of sleep */,
  "sleep_end" TEXT /* End time of sleep */,
  "sleep_quality" REAL /* Quality of sleep */,
  "sleep_quality_score" REAL /* Score for the quality of sleep */,
  "sleep_disruptions" INTEGER /* Number of disruptions during sleep */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_data" (
  "heart_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "heart_rate_value" REAL /* Value of the heart rate */,
  "heart_rate_time" TEXT /* Time of the heart rate measurement */,
  "heart_rate_zone" TEXT /* Zone of the heart rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heart_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_data" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_time" TEXT /* Time of the location measurement */,
  "location_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_data" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Level of the battery */,
  "battery_time" TEXT /* Time of the battery measurement */,
  "battery_health" TEXT /* Health of the battery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  "calibration_time" TEXT /* Time of the calibration measurement */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_data" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "firmware_time" TEXT /* Time of the firmware measurement */,
  "firmware_update_available" INTEGER /* Whether a firmware update is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES device_data ("data_id")
)
